prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: XGI-CARCARRIER-BLK-PZ-AMZ-2 Product Type: TOY_VEHICLE_SET Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio 11pc Diecast Toy Vehicle Car Carrier Play Set, Army Men Description: The awesome 11pc Army Military Semi Truck Toy Vehicle Transporter with 6 Diecast Cars Playset from Kidplokio comes with six military diecast vehicles and some roadside accessories, that can be tucked away into the sides of a larger semi truck transporter toy. The larger semi truck toy features two plastic snap closure sidings to ensure all the piece stay together after playtime and don’t get lost!

The front of the military army semi truck toy also features a cool, built-in diecast car slide! Kids can place diecast cars down the slide and watch the cars shoot out the front of the truck; a fun game in itself to see whose car can make it the farthest! No batteries or assembly required here.

The army military toy truck car transporter is constructed of heavy-duty, durable plastic, meaning it can stand up to lots of everyday playtime wear and tear whether at home, traveling or out at play dates. In addition, playing with a manual truck toy can also help your little one use his or her imagination, encourage exploration and creativity, sharpen their motor skills and learn to share with their playmates too!

With a military army theme, clever design, easy travel portability and battery and/or charge-free, hours of fun playtime for little ones and their friends or siblings await!

Warning: Choking Hazard (small parts)

Recommended Ages: 3+ Search Terms: racing game map toy race cars diecast cars for kids racing game playmat kids racing themed toys board games for kids toy truck carriers carrier truck toys toy trucks for boys gifts for boys gifts for girls christmas gifts for kids Features: - ARMY MILITARY SEMI TRUCK TOY: This awesome semi truck toy comes with 6 military diecast vehicles, that can be tucked away into the sides of a larger semi truck transporter toy! The larger semi truck toy features two plastic snap closure sidings to ensure all the piece stay together after playtime - COOL BUILT IN DIECAST CAR SLIDE: The front of the military army semi truck toy features a cool built in diecast car slide! Kids can place diecast cars down slide and watch it shoot out the front of the toy truck to see whose car can make it the farthest! No batteries or assembly required here - ENDLESS PRETEND PLAY POSSIBILITIES: With so many playing options available, kids will have hours of fun, racing cars and driving the large semi truck toy; this vehicle playset is also great for cognitive development as kids think up lots of pretend play scenarios, while also working their gross and fine motor skills playing with cars and semi truck toy - GREAT TOY TRUCK FOR TRAVEL: The army military kids semi truck toy is constructed of heavy duty, durable plastic, meaning it can stand up to lots of everyday playtime wear and tear; the plastic side snap closure and retractable carrier handle make this a great toy to travel === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
